title: Kenza's determination pays off
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In a world that often...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In a world that often emphasises early beginnings in competitive sports, Kenza Neill is proving that it's never too late to pursue a passion.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - In a world that often emphasises early beginnings in competitive sports, Kenza Neill is proving that it's never too late to pursue a passion."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Kenza, deputy head girl at Union High School, moved to Graaff-Reinet from Tarkastad in 2019."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Adjusting to a new school and environment can be daunting, especially for a young teenager. However, this experience opened the door to an unexpected adventure,\" says Mariëtte Burger, Media representative at this prestigious school in Graaff-Reinet.","html":"\"Adjusting to a new school and environment can be daunting, especially for a young teenager. However, this experience opened the door to an unexpected adventure,\" says Mariëtte Burger, Media representative at this prestigious school in Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon arriving at Union High, Kenza was quickly drawn into the school’s vibrant hockey culture.","html":"Upon arriving at Union High, Kenza was quickly drawn into the school’s vibrant hockey culture."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite having never touched a hockey stick before, the excitement around the sport sparked her interest. With encouragement from her peers and coaches, she decided to give hockey a try.","html":"Despite having never touched a hockey stick before, the excitement around the sport sparked her interest. With encouragement from her peers and coaches, she decided to give hockey a try."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She joined the u.16B team, stepping boldly into a new challenge.","html":"She joined the u.16B team, stepping boldly into a new challenge."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Kenza faced a steep learning curve, but her determination shone through."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She practised tirelessly, learning the fundamentals of the game and honing her skills. Her hard work paid off.","html":"She practised tirelessly, learning the fundamentals of the game and honing her skills. Her hard work paid off."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As her confidence grew, she moved up to the u.16A team, continuing to impress everyone around her with her dedication and talent.","html":"As her confidence grew, she moved up to the u.16A team, continuing to impress everyone around her with her dedication and talent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But Kenza did not stop there.","html":"But Kenza did not stop there."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Through perseverance and a love for the sport, she advanced to the first team, and last week, she was announced as the captain of the first hockey team.","html":"Through perseverance and a love for the sport, she advanced to the first team, and last week, she was announced as the captain of the first hockey team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many believe that excellence in sports belongs only to those who start young, but Kenza's story proves otherwise.","html":"Many believe that excellence in sports belongs only to those who start young, but Kenza's story proves otherwise."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trying a new sport can be daunting, but it can also lead to discovering hidden talents and passions.","html":"Trying a new sport can be daunting, but it can also lead to discovering hidden talents and passions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"So, if you've ever thought about picking up a sport, take a cue from Kenza. Embrace the opportunity to learn and grow, regardless of your age."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You never know what you might achieve or how much joy a new sport can bring into your life.","html":"You never know what you might achieve or how much joy a new sport can bring into your life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is never too late to start: all you need is the courage to give it a go!","html":"It is never too late to start: all you need is the courage to give it a go!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
